arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot wants Premier League change to help stop injury issues
arts.sum: Liverpool are without goalkeeper Alisson, who picked up a hamstring injury recently, and Arne Slot believes the Premier League schedule does not help the situation

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer predicts 'crazy' Liverpool transfer situation – 'We're all amazed'
arts.sum: Match of the Day's Alan Shearer has admitted that he's baffled that Liverpool are yet to offer Trent Alexander-Arnold a new contract, with interest from the likes of Real Madrid growing concerning
